page.title: Installation
page.lead: In this section, you will learn how to install and configure SkyguardJS in your project.

prerequisites.description: Before installing SkyguardJS, make sure you have NodeJS and TypeScript installed with these versions:

quickInstall.description: Select your package manager to copy the installation command and install the library.

verify.note: By default, if you do not specify a port in the run function, the server runs on port 3000.
